title: Column with Everhour tracked time
excerpt:

posts.author: Daniel.prudente (DP)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I have Everhour integrated on Monday since the built-in time tracker from Monday is very poor in features (like it doesn’t allow different users tracking a specific task at the same time, doesn’t have a browser extension, doesn’t stop the track of a task when you start another, etc.). The issue is that Everhour times are shown as part of the Item column, not making possible to create charts with them. Is there a way to have those numbers as columns?

image1304×264 16.9 KB

posts.author: Daniel.prudente (DP)
posts.cookedHtml: After talking to the Monday.com and Everhour supports, I was informed that this is not possible. The Everhour integration is only from Everhour to Monday.com and Everhour cannot do this. The solution was doing via Zapier.
